description: Bubble Cash is a competitive bubble shooter game where players aim and launch colored bubbles from the bottom of the screen to match three or more of the same color, causing them to pop and clear the board. Each player in a match receives an identical, pre-arranged bubble layout, fostering a skill-based competition. The user interface involves tapping and dragging on the screen to aim a laser guide, then releasing to fire the bubble, with a visible timer and score display. Progression is achieved by competing in real-time multiplayer tournaments where players strive to clear their board quickly and efficiently to earn a high score. The objective is to pop and blast all bubbles, with victory awarded to players who rank in the top 3 based on their score within the given time limit.
